content: Just as principal component analysis extracts the most statistically meaningful low-dimensional structure from a high-dimensional raw dataset, we can distill a distilled "principal chain of thought" from a large language model's full, sprawling set of candidate intermediate reasoning paths to improve reasoning accuracy and efficiency. This refined principal chain retains only the most variance-driving, core logical steps that contribute to a correct conclusion, cutting out redundant or misleading tangents that often plague standard CoT generation.
